name: Customer Churn Demo
description: Predict whether a customer is likely to churn from usage, support, contract, and login behavior.
demo_goal: Identify customers at risk of leaving.
onboarding_goal: I want to predict which customers may churn.
expected_warnings: Check identifier-like columns such as customer_id before training.
recommended_next_action: Run target recommendation and leakage check before model comparison.

name: Manufacturing Quality Demo
description: Predict product defects from machine temperature, vibration, pressure, humidity, and shift data.
demo_goal: Find production runs that may be defective.
onboarding_goal: I want to predict manufacturing defects from machine signals.
expected_warnings: Review batch_id as an identifier-like column.
recommended_next_action: Use the leakage/excluded-column review before training.

name: Public Bike Signup Demo
description: Estimate public bike signup count from month, user group, promotion count, stations, and weather.
demo_goal: Estimate public bike signup demand from historical CSV data.
onboarding_goal: I want to estimate public bike signups from historical CSV data.
expected_warnings: Month-like columns may need review depending on prediction timing.
recommended_next_action: Run regression model comparison and review the grounded report.
